architecture.summary: Single Next.js API route following existing bulk-reprocess pattern. Prisma DB queries for PUBLISHED skills with T1/T2 trustTier, creates Submission records, enqueues to CF Queue. publishSkill() already handles upsert on re-scan.

integrations.summary: All existing: Prisma DB, CF Queue (SUBMISSION_QUEUE), KV (SUBMISSIONS_KV). No new integrations needed.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - Admin API endpoint only, no UI component.

performance.summary: Batched 500/call with hasMore pagination. Queue chunks of 100. Targets 34,342 T2 skills over ~69 calls.

security.summary: X-Internal-Key (cron/CLI) OR SUPER_ADMIN Bearer token. Same auth pattern as bulk-reprocess.

edge-cases.summary: Skip skills with pending submissions, blocked/tainted skills. Optional flag to skip skills that already have T2 scan results. Dry-run mode for previewing counts.
